name: Generic API
description: Connect to any REST-based translation API. Supports configurable base URL, authentication methods, and request formats. Ideal for self-hosted translation services or custom integrations.
author: Spwig

base_url.label: API Base URL
base_url.help_text: Base URL of the translation service (e.g., https://translate.example.com:8443)

api_key.label: API Key
api_key.help_text: API key for authentication (leave empty if not required)

auth_method.label: Authentication Method
auth_method.help_text: How to send the API key in requests

request_format.label: Request Format
request_format.help_text: How the API expects translation requests

translate_path.label: Translate Path
translate_path.help_text: Path for the translate endpoint (default: /translate). Change for APIs with different paths (e.g., /v2/translate)

response_field.label: Response Field
response_field.help_text: JSON field name in the API response containing translated text (leave empty for format default)

changes: Changed API Endpoint to Base URL for better multi-endpoint support
Added batch translation support via /translate_batch endpoint
Added health check via /health endpoint during connection test
Added configurable translate path for non-standard APIs
Initial release with configurable endpoint, auth methods, and request formats
